data.title: Crypto Giant Kraken Now Offers Commission-Free Stock Trading
data.description:
TL;DR Kraken enabled commission-free trading of over 11,000 stocks and ETFs for users in ten U. S. states, with plans to gradually expand access. The platform allows users to manage cryptocurrencies, stocks, stablecoins, and cash from a single account, with features like automatic reinvestment and fractional trading. The exchange aims to integrate traditional and digital assets. . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/crypto-giant-kraken-now-offers-commission-free-stock-trading/

data.title: Kraken expands beyond crypto, launches stock trading in the US
data.description:
Kraken is expanding into traditional finance by launching access to over 11,000 US-listed stocks and exchange-traded funds (ETFs), according to an April 14 statement. The crypto trading firm revealed that its users can now trade equities commission-free through Kraken Securities LLC, a newly launched FINRA-regulated arm of the exchange.
source: https://cryptoslate.com/kraken-expands-beyond-crypto-launches-stock-trading-in-the-us/

data.title: Whale Address Sells Bitcoin at a Loss, Reports BlockBeats
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, a whale address has recently redeemed 400 BTC, valued at $33.83 million, and sold them at a loss. This transaction occurred four hours ago, as monitored by Lookonchain.

Four months ago, the whale address purchased 2,000 BTC for $197.8 million at a price of $98,896 per Bitcoin. The selling activity began on March 11, with the address redeeming and selling BTC.

To date, the address has sold a total of 1,200 BTC for $98.6 million at an average price of $82,171 per Bitcoin, resulting in a total loss of $31.8 million.

data.title: A whale deposited 6 million USDC into Hyperliquid and went long on ETH with 5x leverage
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, about 50 minutes ago, a whale deposited 6 million USDC into Hyperliquid and went long on ETH with 5x leverage at a price of $1,624.44.

data.title: A whale unstaked 400 BTC in 4 hours and sold them at a loss
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, a whale sold 400 BTC at a loss after unstaking them in 4 hours, which is worth about 33.83 million US dollars.
It is reported that the whale bought 2,000 BTC (197.8 million US dollars) at a price of 98,896 US dollars four months ago, and began to unstake and sell them on March 11. It is reported that he sold 1,200 BTC (98.6 million US dollars) at a price of 82,171 US dollars, and the total loss is currently 31.8 million US dollars.

data.title: U.S. Implements Tariffs on Imported Pharmaceuticals
data.description: According to BlockBeats, U.S. President Donald Trump announced that the United States has addressed inflation and seen a rise in the stock market. The country will impose tariffs on imported pharmaceuticals, with tariffs being the only requirement.

data.title: A whale deposited 8,922 ETH to Kraken in the past hour
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, whales are selling ETH. A whale (0xc19D) deposited 8,922 ETH worth 14.82 million US dollars to Kraken in the past hour; and another whale (0x4e7a) sold 8,001 ETH worth 13.06 million US dollars in the past hour.

data.title: Binance: The platform has resumed ZEC withdrawals
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Binance Customer Support’s post on the X platform, the Binance platform has resumed ZEC withdrawals. Binance has been working closely with relevant teams to resolve the ZEC wallet issue, which has been resolved.
